chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-555 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 30-04-2025 Mr. Muhammad Adil Pathan, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG a/w SIP Gulzar, I.O of the case. **** Statements filed by respondents No.2&5 are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioners. It appears that petitioner No.1 was produced before concerned Magistrate, where her statement under section 164 CrPC was recorded, who in her statement has not supported the contents of FIR. I.O is present and submits that in view of said statement, he will dispose of the case under C-class. After such a statement, counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of along with pending application(s) with directions to I.O to submit such report, as suggested by him, before the concerned Magistrate within seven days. Meanwhile, official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
